reviews.author: Art Attack
reviews.review_body: Most of the teachers are rude to the children. Not a good environment in the class. Strict behaviour, a lot of facilities are lacking here. No playground, no fun activities, excessive unnecessary homework is given, some of the teachers I had were the worst behavior. (ex student)

reviews.author: Syed Fahim
reviews.review_body:
Provides excellent Education with Value added Education. Dedicated Teachers with good experience Faculty.
May Allah bless them. Aameen

reviews.author: Idris Ahsan
reviews.review_body: I was ex student of this institution. The Principle and faculty helped me a lot in academics and Islamic knowledge. This institution helped me a lot in to be a practicing muslim, thanks and JazakAllah khair to all teachers. May Allah swt reward them in duniya and akhirah.

reviews.author: Abdul Samad
reviews.review_body:
Assalamualaikum...

Alhamdulillah Great school with professional leaders, Islamic environment and brilliant studies.
Stamford team also teach Aqlaaq manner to the children.
Great school that I ever saw, I thank Allah that he guided us to this school.

JazakAllah-hu-Khairan to the school management...
Thank you.

reviews.author: Muhammad Junaid Imran
reviews.review_body:
السلام عليكم و رحمة الله و بركاته

Alhamdulillah it is really very good educational institution where it covers both deen & duniya of the our kids. May Allah Kareem bless health & long life to Hafeez sir, Najeeb bhai & all its staff members, they really personally care each & every kid.

جزاك اللهُ خيرًا

Regards,
Mohammed Junaid Imran
